content:
# Session 78 (iter-078) ‚Äî review

## Metadata
- Sorry: global **5 ‚Üí 5** (PresheafDualPullback.lean **1 ‚Üí 1**, sorry moved L920 ‚Üí L1062;
  TensorObjInverse.lean 4; SliceTransport 0). SOLO `prove` on PresheafDualPullback.lean (only file edited).
- Build: `lake build ‚Ä¶PresheafDualPullback` **EXIT 0** (8324 jobs), 0 errors, 0 new axioms, 1 sorry.
  sync_leanok ran (iter 78, sha 6e5c640, +0/‚àí0).
- Target: `presheafDualPullbackComparison_restrict` `case hstar` (the c.2 residual ‚òÖ).
- 27 code-change edits on the file + 3 new helper lemmas.

## Headline: the 4-iter FC-opacity blocker is RESOLVED; residual changed kind (sorry flat)
- `case hstar` was blocked iters 074‚Äì078 on `FC = leftAdjointCompIso` opacity. iter-078 executed the
  iter-075/analogist-validated route and **fully reduced the LHS in compiling code**:
  - `FC.hom.app dM` expanded sectionwise via Mathlib **`Adjunction.leftAdjointCompIso_hom_app`** (4-term
    unit/counit composite); middle `e.inv` factor drops since `PresheafOfModules.pushforwardComp = Iso.refl`.
  - The three `pushforwardPushforwardAdj` unit/counit factors reduced via **local `:= rfl` re-statements**
    of the root-file privates (`ppadj_unit_app_app_apply`, `ppadj_counit_app_app_apply`).
  - Pushforward `.map` / object wrappers peeled (`pushforward_map_app_apply`, `pushforward_obj_map_apply`).
  - The three resulting `M.val.dual.map` dual-restriction maps collapsed to a **single `œÜ.app(slice) z`**
    by the NEW `:= rfl` brick `dual_map_app_apply`.
- The single `sorry` (L1062) now sits on a **thin-poset / naturality coherence at the `œÜ.app` level**
  (NO FC, NO adjunction unit/counit, NO carrier-diamond opacity), not on the opaque FC giant goal.

## Attempts (from attempts_raw.jsonl ‚Äî 27 edits)
1. `simp only [FC]; rw [Adjunction.leftAdjointCompIso_hom_app]` ‚Üí FC explicit (success). Then
   `simp only [PresheafOfModules.pushforwardComp, Iso.refl_inv, NatTrans.id_app]` drops the middle factor.
2. `simp only [comp_app, ModuleCat.hom_comp, LinearMap.comp_apply]` to distribute `.app V`. Peeling the
   `pushforward.map` layers: plain `rw` FAILS (`ConcreteCategory.hom` vs `ModuleCat.Hom.hom` coercion-form
   mismatch); bare `erw` BOMBS whnf. Fix = `erw` with **explicit anchoring args**
   (`pushforward_map_app_apply Œ≤h Œ± V œÜ`, value lemmas with `(adj:=‚Ä¶)(œÜ:=‚Ä¶)(œà:=‚Ä¶)(N:=‚Ä¶)(U:=‚Ä¶)`).
3. The 3 unit/counit factors ‚Üí dual restriction maps via `ppadj_*_app_app_apply`. Counit-at-pushforward-
   object reductions carrier-diamond-heavy ‚áí `maxHeartbeats 3.2M ‚Üí 12.8M` (finite, documented in-code).
4. `pushforward_obj_map_apply (œÜ:=‚Ä¶)(M:=M.val.dual)(f:=‚Ä¶)` peels object restrictions (Mathlib `rfl`).
5. `erw [dual_map_app_apply √ó3]` collapses to `œÜ.app(slice)`. Residual `sorry` at L1062.

## New helper lemmas (all `:= rfl`, axiom-clean, auditor-confirmed genuine)
- `PresheafOfModules.ppadj_unit_app_app_apply` (L237) ‚Äî re-statement of root private.
- `PresheafOfModules.ppadj_counit_app_app_apply` (L250) ‚Äî re-statement of root private.
- `PresheafOfModules.dual_map_app_apply` (L267) ‚Äî sectionwise value of presheaf-dual restriction map
  (`((dual M).map g œÜ).app W‚ÇÄ = œÜ.app ((Over.map g.unop).op.obj W‚ÇÄ)`). **Load-bearing in `case hstar`.**
- All three are blueprint-coverage debt (no `\lean`/`\uses` block) ‚Äî see recommendations.

## Residual (crisp, documented in-code L1062)
`X.presheaf.map(eqToIso).op (œÜ.app sliceL z) = œÜ.app sliceR (RHS_z)` where sliceL = triple-`Over.map`
reindex of `slice‚ÇÅ`, sliceR = `slice‚ÇÇ`. Close route (next iter, mechanical):
- two slices `Subsingleton.elim`-equal in thin `Over (Opens X)` (equal domain by `Scheme.Hom.comp_image`,
  equal codomain);
- RHS reduced via `restrictFunctorComp_hom_app_app` (Sheaf.lean:401, `@[simp]`, `rfl`);
- LHS `eqToIso` reindex / RHS `z`-reindex reconcile via `œÜ`'s `naturality_apply`.
- **Exact dual template: `TensorObjSubstrate.lean:4955‚Äì4967`** ‚Äî `rw [restrictFunctorComp_hom_app_app];
  erw [‚Üê M.presheaf.map_comp]; congr 1; exact Subsingleton.elim _ _`.

## Convergence read (honest)
- PARTIAL, real structural advance. sorry count flat, but the **5th-consecutive-iter no-sorry-elimination**
  on `case hstar` is real ‚Äî progress-critic returned **STUCK** at iter-078 plan. iter-078 executed the
  STUCK-corrective (analogist disproved the FC‚Üíconcrete-pushforwardComp swap, validated the
  `leftAdjointCompIso_hom_app` route) and the corrective **delivered**: the 4-iter blocker is dissolved,
  not re-characterised. Residual is now mechanical with an exact dual template.
- **Hard watch for next iter:** the close is now fully specified. If this well-templated mechanical
  reconciliation does NOT close next iter, the route is genuinely STUCK (no further FC re-diagnosis is
  possible ‚Äî FC is fully reduced) ‚Üí escalate (effort-break the residual / deeper analogist) rather than
  another grind. Each prior iter named a *new* blocker (whnf-seam‚ÜíFC-opacity‚Üíwrong-brick); there is no
  new blocker left to name on the LHS, so a non-close next iter is a true stall signal.

## Subagents (review phase)
- **lean-auditor** `iter078`: SOUND ‚Äî 0 critical / 3 major / 3 minor. Three new `:= rfl` re-statements
  GENUINE (not vacuous); L1062 sorry HONESTLY a thin-poset residual; no axiom leakage; `12.8M` HB
  justified. Major = (a) in-code comments mislabel the edit as **iter-079** (prover off-by-one;
  cosmetic), (b) borderline `DRAFT` comment on a load-bearing lemma, (c) stale "next pass"/temporal claim.
  Report: `task_results/lean-auditor-iter078.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `presheafdualpullback-iter078`: faithful, **0 must-fix**, 2 major / 2 minor.
  FC-opacity prose correctly UP TO DATE. Major = (a) c.2 close-route prose + `\uses` still credit
  `slice_dual_transport_comp` (now bypassed) + FC-mate route (dropped); (b) `dual_map_app_apply` has no
  blueprint block. Minor = `ppadj_*` re-statements unpinned, final-residual closers under-named.
  Report: `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-presheafdualpullback-iter078.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:presheafdual_pullback_comparison_restrict` (proof block ~L8238):
  added `% NOTE` flagging the stale close-route prose (still credits `slice_dual_transport_comp` /
  FC-mate; actual iter-078 route = `leftAdjointCompIso_hom_app` + local value lemmas; residual =
  `Subsingleton` + `restrictFunctorComp_hom_app_app` + `naturality_apply`; add `dual_map_app_apply` block).
- No `\leanok` override: lvb confirmed markers consistent with the single open sorry (L1062). sync ran.

## Blueprint doctor
- Clean (no orphans, no broken `\ref`/`\uses`/`\proves`, no axioms).

## Notes (LOW)
- Prover internally labeled this iter "iter-079" in task_result + in-code comments (off-by-one vs the
  real iter-078). Cosmetic; flagged for the next prover to correct when it touches the block.
- 120 unmatched `lean_aux` nodes standing (was 118); +3 = this session's new helpers.
